zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Foliot於1270年出生在英國戴文特福德時，他的父親Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot21歲，母親Margery de Newmarch33歲。他與Ada de Sanford結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1312年在英國英格蘭多瑟特梅爾波利 桑普福德享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Foliot was born in 1270, in Whitford, Devon, England, his father, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, was 21 and his mother, Margery de Newmarch, was 33. He married Ada de Sanford. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1312, in Melbury Sampford, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Foliot est né en 1270, à Whitford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margery de Newmarch, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Ada de Sanford. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1312, à Melbury Sampford, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Foliot 1270 in Whitford, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot 21 und seine Mutter Margery de Newmarch 33. Er hat Ada de Sanford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1312 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Melbury Sampford, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Ada de Sanford. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1312, nel Melbury Sampford, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Foliotが1270年にイギリスデボンウィトフォードで生まれた時，父Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliotは21歳，母Margery de Newmarchは33歳であった。Ada de Sanfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1312年にイギリスイギリスドールセトメルブリー サンプフォードで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Foliot(이)가 1270년 영국 데폰 휘트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Newmarch(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Ada de Sanford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 멜버이 샘p퍼드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Foliot родился в 1270 г. в местности уитфорд, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margery de Newmarch, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada de Sanford. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1312 г. в местности мелбури сэмпфорд, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.
